title: Tissue culture
steps: Thaw enough cells to obtain and be able to seed 8x10 6 cells per plate or transfection Day -1. Usually, 2 frozen vials of 10x10 6 cells yield enough cells for 6 regions each with 7 transfections each (approximately 350 x 10 6 cells).
Plate and culture cells in 4 15cm plates with 20 mL - 25 mL of growth media (IMDM + 10% Fetal Bovine Serum) each.
Aspirate media and wash once with 10 mL PBS.
Prepare and add 20 mL - 25 mL growth media with 10 μg/ml Blast to each plate.
Aspirate media and wash TWICE with 10 mL PBS.
Add 20 mL - 25 mL growth media to each plate.
Wash plate with 10 mL PBS, trypsinize with 2 mL Trypsin and neutralize with 10 mL growth media.
Collect cells in 2 x 50 mL Falcon tubes and centrifuge at 1000 rpm, , 10 minutes .
Prepare as many 10 mL plates for as the number of transfections needed; add 10 mL growth media .
Resuspend cells in 40 mL total volume and count.
Seed 8x10 6 cells per plate.
1 hour prior to transfection, refresh media and label plates, keep at 37 °C .
Verify sgRNA plasmid and library plasmid preparations have been endotoxin treated.

Calculate volume of SNV library needed for each transfection. Use 3 µg SNV library DNA per transfection and 7 transfections per region, which includes a negative control (7x 3 µg = 21 µg SNV library per region).

Calculate volume of guide RNA needed for each transfection. Use 12 µg guide per transfection and carry out 6 transfections per region (6x 12 µg = 72 µg guide RNA per region). For the negative controls, use 12 µg HPRT guide RNA.
15 minutes before transfecting, thaw Xfect transfection reagent and buffer On ice .
Add add SNV library plasmid and guide plasmid to an Eppendorf Lo-Bind tube; then add Xfect buffer to 750 µL final volume; vortex and spin down.
Add 9 µL of Xfect transfection reagent; vortex briefly and spin down.
Incubate reaction mix at RT for 10 – 00:15:00 .
Add transfection mix to each plate according to labels.
Transfer to incubator at 37 °C /5% CO 2 for minimum 04:00:00 .
Aspirate transfection media from plates and replace with fresh 10% FBS IMDM .
Aspirate media, then wash and aspirate once with 10 mL PBS.
Prepare and add 20 mL - 25 mL growth media with 3 μg/ml Puro + 10 μg/ml Blast to each plate.
Aspirate media, then wash and aspirate once with 10mL PBS.
Prepare and add 20 mL - 25 mL growth media with 3 μg/ml Puro + 10 μg/ml Blast to each plate.
Aspirate media, then wash and aspirate twice with 10 mL PBS.
Prepare and add 20 mL - 25 mL growth media with 10 μg/ml Blast (no puro) to each plate.
Setup 15 cm plates with 20 mL IMDM+10%FBS (one 15 cm plate per every two 10 cm transfected cells).
Wash plates with 10 mL PBS, trypsinize with 2 mL Trypsin and neutralize with 10 mL growth media.
Merge cells from two 10 cm plates into one 50 mL Falcon tube.
Centrifuge at 1000 rpm, , 10 minutes .
Aspirate media and resuspend cells in 1 mL growth media.
Seed 200 µL cells in each 15 cm plate; incubate at 37 °C .
Harvest the remaining 800 µL cells in 2 1.5 mL tubes each with 400 µL volume (“handoff” and “backup” pellets).
Centrifuge at 500 rpm, , 5 minutes .
Aspirate and wash with 500 µL 1X PBS.
Aspirate and freeze pellets at -80 °C .
For each plate, a aspirate media, then wash and aspirate once with 10 mL PBS.
Dissociate with 2 mL Trypsin and neutralize with 10 mL growth media.
Collect cells in individual 50 mL Falcon tubes and centrifuge at 500 rpm, , 5 minutes .
Aspirate media.
Resuspend in 10 mL growth media.
Seed cells into 14 cm dishes at 15x10 6 cells per plate.
Setup 15 cm plates with 20 mL IMDM+10%FBS.
Wash plates with 10 mL PBS, trypsinize with 2 mL Trypsin and neutralize with 10 mL IMDM+10%FBS.
Collects cells in 15 mL Falcon tubes.
Centrifuge at 1000 rpm, , 10 minutes .
Aspirate media and resuspend cells in 1 mL IMDM+10%FBS.
Seed 200 µL cells in each 15 cm plate; incubate at 37 °C .
Harvest the remaining 800 µL cells in two eppendorf tubes each with 400 µL volume (“handoff” and “backup” pellets).
Centrifuge at 500 rpm, , 5 minutes .
Aspirate and ash with 500 µL PBS.
Aspirate and freeze pellets at -80 °C .
Wash plates with 10 mL PBS, trypsinize with 2 mL Trypsin and neutralize with 10 mL IMDM+10%FBS.
Collects cells in 15 mL Falcon tubes.
Centrifuge at 1000 rpm, , 10 minutes .
Aspirate media and resuspend cells in 1 mL IMDM+10%FBS.
Seed 200 µL cells in each 15 cm plate; incubate at 37 °C .
Harvest the remaining 800 µL cells in one eppendorf tube.
Centrifuge at 500 rpm, , 5 minutes .
Aspirate and ash with 500 µL PBS.
Aspirate and freeze pellets at -80 °C .
creator: Nahum Smith
